name: Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a stainless steel pot.
2. Slowly bring to a boil until the mixture is reduced by half.
3. Allow it to cool and thicken until it reaches the consistency of unwhipped heavy cream.
4. Use immediately or store in the refrigerator for up to 2 months.
5. Serve at room temperature as a dip for fried foods that are not particularly sweet on their own.
6. For a smooth sauce, blend the ingredients before cooking.
